---
title: "Osmdata"
description: "Mark Padgham, Robin Lovelace, Maëlle Salmon, and Bob Rudis (2017). Osmdata. *The Journal of Open Source Software*. https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.00305"
date: "2017-06-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "padgham_osmdata_2017"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "The Journal of Open Source Software"
doi: "10.21105/joss.00305"
publication-url: "https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.00305"
authors:
  - "Mark Padgham"
  - "Robin Lovelace"
  - "Maëlle Salmon"
  - "Bob Rudis"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** The Journal of Open Source Software
**Year:** 2017

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.00305) [URL](https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.00305) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Mark Padgham, Robin Lovelace, Maëlle Salmon, and Bob Rudis (2017). Osmdata. *The Journal of Open Source Software*. https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.00305

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{padgham_osmdata_2017,
  ids = {osmdata2017},
  title = {Osmdata},
  author = {Padgham, Mark and Lovelace, Robin and Salmon, Maëlle and Rudis, Bob},
  date = {2017-06},
  journaltitle = {The Journal of Open Source Software},
  volume = {2},
  number = {14},
  publisher = {[object Object]},
  doi = {10.21105/joss.00305},
  url = {https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.00305}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
